contentHeader.name: injection molding machine
contentHeader.comment:
Information This project is a OFFLINE project. That means the whole application is only for use in SIMULATION mode There is also a Microsoft Word file, that contains the differences between PL7/Concept to Unity and more information for this application.. Please read the "welcome file" at the process overview before starting this simulation.
Developed by Stefan Probst 07.05.2003

variables.name: Weighing_B_done
variables.comment: Internal bit for weighing Material B done

variables.name: Material_b_in
variables.comment: Internal bit for material B in feeder

variables.name: material_b_value
variables.comment: Starting value for weighing material B
